verification_checklist: Run npm test
Run npm run capture:model-ui:screenshots
feature render paths must not emit raw input, select, textarea, or checkbox markup outside approved helpers
new primitives or variants require updating the repo-local contract first
generated UI must include a local check command or equivalent static inspection
Verify substantive visuals use imagegen or premium Three.js/WebGL/D3-style rendering when the spec calls for them.
Provide browser-rendered visual-background contrast evidence for text over images, canvas, WebGL, video, gradients, or generated visuals.
Verify non-text contrast for meaningful icons, charts, state indicators, custom controls, and authored focus indicators.
Verify forced-colors or high-contrast behavior when custom colors, gradients, overlays, or authored focus styles are used.
Verify focus-visible evidence for interactive controls.
Verify focus order, keyboard navigation, focus-not-obscured behavior, and no keyboard trap for custom widgets, overlays, dialogs, and embedded experiences.
Verify reduced-motion behavior for animation and rendered visuals.
Verify pause, stop, hide, or update-frequency control for auto-moving or auto-updating content.
Verify form labels, instructions, text errors, correction suggestions, and status/live-region messages when forms or async states are present.
Verify semantic content or accessible fallback for images, canvas, WebGL, video, generated visuals, and D3-style visualization.
Verify captions, transcripts, descriptions, or media alternatives when audio or video is present.
Verify target size or valid target spacing/equivalent-control exceptions for dense or touch-oriented controls.
Verify responsive no-overflow evidence at desktop and mobile sizes.
deterministic-with-judgmentkit desktop screenshot has a styled primary work surface
deterministic-with-judgmentkit mobile screenshot keeps the decision and handoff visible
desktop viewport screenshot
mobile viewport screenshot
keyboard focus check for interactive controls
overflow check for long labels, descriptions, and values
modal or dialog footer order check when dialogs are present
disabled, empty, error, and ready state review
Verify state: selected work item is visible
Verify state: decision evidence is scannable
Verify state: primary action and handoff reason are clear
Verify required state: empty
Verify required state: ready
Verify required state: loading
Verify required state: error
Verify required state: disabled
Verify required state: focus-visible

artifacts.rendering_policy: Visible artifact is generated from the reviewed handoff plus compiled frontend skill context with no Material UI adapter.
artifacts.approach_title: Fixture-rendered baseline - JudgmentKit skill context
artifacts.approach_caption: Fixture-rendered baseline receives the reviewed handoff plus compiled frontend skill context, but no Material UI adapter. This isolates skill-guided implementation without a component renderer.

feature render paths must not emit raw input, select, textarea, or checkbox markup outside approved helpers
new primitives or variants require updating the repo-local contract first
generated UI must include a local check command or equivalent static inspection
gpt55-xhigh-codex-judgmentkit-material-ui desktop screenshot has a styled primary work surface
gpt55-xhigh-codex-judgmentkit-material-ui mobile screenshot keeps the decision and handoff visible
desktop viewport screenshot
mobile viewport screenshot
keyboard focus check for interactive controls
overflow check for long labels, descriptions, and values
modal or dialog footer order check when dialogs are present
disabled, empty, error, and ready state review

Verify state: decision evidence is scannable
Verify state: primary action and handoff reason are clear

capture_provenance.notes: Gemma 4 (local LLM) output captured through lms for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix. Capture transcript predates the current generated matrix context and is retained as an explicitly marked legacy capture until recaptured.

capture_validation.message: gemma4-lms-with-judgmentkit JudgmentKit static CSS must use active --jk-* design-system tokens at least 4 times.

failures: CSS does not use active JudgmentKit --jk-* design-system tokens at least 4 times

CSS or inline styles use hard-coded visual values instead of active JudgmentKit design-system tokens: css:background, css:color, css:background, css:box-shadow, css:background, css:box-shadow, css:color, css:border-bottom, css:color, css:border-bottom, css:background, css:color, css:background, css:color, css:background, css:color

capture_validation.message: gpt55-xhigh-codex-with-judgmentkit JudgmentKit static CSS must use active --jk-* design-system tokens at least 4 times.

failures: CSS does not use active JudgmentKit --jk-* design-system tokens at least 4 times

CSS uses local visual token names outside the active design-system source: --bg, --surface, --surface-strong, --ink, --muted, --line, --line-strong, --accent, --accent-strong, --accent-soft, --warn, --warn-soft, --danger, --danger-soft, --good, --good-soft, --shadow

CSS or inline styles use hard-coded visual values instead of active JudgmentKit design-system tokens: css:--bg, css:--surface, css:--surface-strong, css:--ink, css:--muted, css:--line, css:--line-strong, css:--accent, css:--accent-strong, css:--accent-soft, css:--warn, css:--warn-soft, css:--danger, css:--danger-soft, css:--good, css:--good-soft, css:--shadow, css:background, css:border-color, css:border-color, css:border-color, css:color, css:background, css:color, css:background, css:border-color, css:border-color, css:border-color, css:border-color, css:background, css:background, css:outline

diagnostic_candidates.rendering_policy: Visible artifact is generated from the reviewed handoff plus compiled frontend skill context with no Material UI adapter.
diagnostic_candidates.approach_title: GPT-5.5 xhigh via codex exec - JudgmentKit skill context
diagnostic_candidates.approach_caption: GPT-5.5 xhigh via codex exec receives the reviewed handoff plus compiled frontend skill context, but no Material UI adapter. This isolates skill-guided implementation without a component renderer.

generation_policy: Static captured-fixture pack. Website builds copy committed accepted artifacts and never call a live model. The 3x4 matrix separates raw brief context, JudgmentKit reviewed handoff plus compiled frontend skill context, Material UI rendering, and the combined JudgmentKit skill plus Material UI path. Candidates that fail implementation or design-system review stay in diagnostic_candidates and are excluded from manifest.artifacts, live artifact routes, screenshots, and release evidence.
